## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (API addition)
- [ ] Format change (touches the on-disk `.ptt` layout - bumped `FORMAT_VERSION`?)
- [ ] Documentation / benchmarks
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated the README / docstrings if the public API changed
- [ ] Exported any new public names from `proteintensor/__init__.py`

## Measured results (if performance-related)

If this affects performance or storage, include the numbers from the relevant
benchmark (and the hardware). Compare against a fair baseline; label any
projection as a projection.

```
<paste benchmark table or numbers here>
```

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on, known limitations, or follow-ups.
